original_final_question: Which county seat corresponds to the New York county that recorded more violent crimes in the year (within 2017-2022) that has the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports when comparing Erie County and Westchester County? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Within 2017 through 2022, determine the year with the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports.
2. Using violent-crime data for that year, determine whether Erie County or Westchester County recorded more violent crimes.
3. Using the reference page for the county seat of the county identified in the previous step, return the county seat city.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with highest LAX Charter passengers (2017-2022) -> 2021
HOP 2 (d=1, data.gov - node 2 depends on node 1):
Node 2: 2021 violent crimes -> Erie County (3,493) vs Westchester County (1,520) -> Erie County
HOP 3 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 3 depends on node 2):
Node 3: Buffalo is the county seat of Erie County -> Buffalo
